that, in the opinion of a majority of the members of the board, the officers recommended for promotion by the board are best qualified for promotion to meet the needs of the Space Force (as noted in the guidelines or information furnished the board under ) among those officers whose names were furnished to the selection board.section 615(b) of this title

children.heading: .—Officers Who Should Be Required to Show Cause for Retention
children.label: b .—Officers Who Should Be Required to Show Cause for Retention
children.text: A selection board convened under shall include in its report the name of any officer before it for consideration for promotion whose record, in the opinion of a majority of the members of the board, indicates that the officer should be required under to show cause for the officer’s retention in a space force active status.section 20211 of this titlesection 20503 of this title

children.heading: .—Officers Recommended to Be Placed Higher on the Promotion List
children.label: c .—Officers Recommended to Be Placed Higher on the Promotion List
children.text: A selection board convened under shall, when authorized under , include in its report the names of those officers recommended by the board to be placed higher on the promotion list and the order in which the board recommends that those officers should be placed on the list.section 20211 of this titlesection 20215(g) of this title

children.heading: .—Recommendation for Officers to Be Excluded From Future Consideration for Promotion
children.label: d .—Recommendation for Officers to Be Excluded From Future Consideration for Promotion
children.text: A selection board convened under may include in its report a recommendation that an officer considered by the board be excluded from future consideration for promotion under this chapter.section 20211 of this title
